description: Simulate Captain Cook's 1769 Transit of Venus observation from Point Venus, Tahiti (17.49° S, 149.49° W, 0m) for a museum exhibit. Capture a screenshot of the transit as it appeared on June 3, 1769, at 21:00 UTC, showing the Sun centered with the silhouette of Venus visible. The view should have the atmosphere disabled and include the azimuthal grid and planet labels. Save the screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Create an exhibit placard at ~/Desktop/transit_exhibit.txt that includes the location (Tahiti or Point Venus), the date (1769), the observer's name (Cook), and a mention of how the transit helped calculate the distance to the Sun or the astronomical unit.

metadata.data_source: Historical record of HMS Endeavour voyage
